result.summary: Found 2 visual layout issues: the fixed bottom navigation is covering page content, and several horizontally arranged items are clipped on the right edge.

issues.description: The sticky bottom navigation bar overlaps the content area, hiding the lower row of game cards behind it.
issues.suggestion: Add enough bottom padding/margin to the scrollable content so the last cards can sit fully above the fixed footer, or make the footer non-overlapping.

issues.description: Several horizontally arranged elements are cut off at the right edge, including the 'Hot Games' tab and the rightmost game tiles in the grids.
issues.suggestion: Ensure these sections have proper horizontal scrolling or additional right-side padding so items are fully visible within the viewport.
